text:
I selected all in distribution select, archive extraction:
base.txz
kernel.txz
base-dbg.txz
kernel-dbg.txz
lib32-dbg.txz
lib32.txz
ports.txz
src.txz
tests.txz

Speculation: it was supposed to be either lib32-dbg or lib32 selected, not both.

FIX (based on speculation):
Make no more than one selectable in group of lib32-dbg, lib32, yet should still be possible to uncheck.
